case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. ALFREDO ESCOBAR SALINAS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALINAS, ALFREDO ESCOBAR $1,962.69 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,052.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARI SARRIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ALFREDO ESCOBAR SALINAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
